afterSnapshot.name: DIRECTION_BATCH_SIZE
afterSnapshot.description: Number of directions to fetch in parallel per batch (2 = 4 API calls per batch). Lower = safer for rate limits, higher = faster.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Created config "DIRECTION_BATCH_SIZE" to satisfy the requested change.
implementation: Used the existing set_config mutation path so validation, changelog, and rebuild behavior stay consistent.
